subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath sent forth the Messengers and made them the lamps of His Cause amidst His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو قد ارسل الرسل و جعلهم مصابیح امره بین عباده و
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
